title: Deliciously Shaggy Filipino Chicken Adobo
description: A fresh and shaggy Filipino dish featuring juniper berries and tadka, perfect for a brunch mood, this keto-friendly adobo is cooked to perfection in a banana leaf vessel.
instructions: Preheat the oven to 375 degrees Fahrenheit.
In a large bowl, mix together the chicken thighs, crushed juniper berries, tadka spices, salt, and black pepper.
In a small bowl, whisk together the coconut vinegar and fish sauce.
Add the vinegar mixture to the chicken mixture and mix well.
Lay a banana leaf flat on a work surface and place a quarter of the chicken mixture in the center of the leaf.
Fold the banana leaf over the chicken to form a packet and repeat with the remaining chicken and leaves.
Place the packets in a large baking dish and bake for 30 minutes.
Remove the packets from the oven and let them rest for 5 minutes before serving.
Cook poultry to an internal temperature of 74°C / 165°F before serving.
